summary: The test suite is comprehensive and covers all stated requirements: max-age policy, max-total-size policy, keep-latest-N per workflow, deletion plan generation with summary fields, dry-run mode, and the report formatter. Edge cases are meaningfully explored — empty list, single artifact, KeepLatestN=0, combined policies, and a flaky delete callback. Design is clean: a shared fixture factory, consistent BeforeAll scoping with $script:now, and well-labeled Describe blocks. Deductions: (1) No boundary-condition test for an artifact whose age is exactly equal to MaxAgeDays (the implementation uses strict '>' so the boundary is untested). (2) There is no test validating that New-RetentionPolicy rejects a negative MaxTotalSizeMB, even though that guard exists in the implementation. (3) $deletedNames is computed but never asserted in the MaxAge test, leaving a dead-code smell. (4) No test covers passing a null DeleteAction in live (non-dry-run) mode. (5) No test verifies tie-breaking behaviour when two artifacts share the same CreatedDate. These gaps are real but moderate; the suite would catch the vast majority of regressions.
